h0ed90c4ag8c48g405dgb005gf2994ad8ac6d: You wretched little insect. I'm going to rip out your spine!
hd6f2195bg8276g4ae2gbdb4ga02fe979401a: You come to my home, interfere in my business, and now have the gall to face me in the heart of my lair? You petulant bollocks.
h5a723a95geb43g4742ga243g99358680451a: I'll rip your spine out your arsehole.
hf30f5178gf66fg4bc6g9118g2a065b81ba48: I'll use your blood to spice my stew.
